articles.title: Iran sends tankers loaded with oil past US military blockade
articles.description: Three Iranian tankers loaded with crude oil have passed the US blockade line in the Gulf of Oman, ship-tracking data shows.

articles.title: BBC announces 550 job cuts as first part of £500m savings plan
articles.description: In an email to staff, the corporation laid out proposals for the initial 200 job losses in the news division.

articles.title: Israel launches fresh strikes on Lebanon despite Trump criticism
articles.description: Speaking on Tuesday, Trump said Israel's PM Benjamin Netanyahu needed "to be more responsible with respect to Lebanon".

articles.title: Harry and Meghan to bring children to UK next month
articles.description: It will be the first time the Duke of Sussex has brought his children to the UK in four years.
